name: Create D+Q bone ClinicalTrials.gov text snapshot
summary: Creates the first retained text_snapshot for a safe public-registry source: the D+Q bone ClinicalTrials.gov API payload, normalized markdown, section index, and updated source-snapshot raw storage state.

scope.question: Retain and normalize the ClinicalTrials.gov registry payload for the D+Q bone RCT so agents can reuse source text without repeated source processing.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks the retained registry text artifact change set and required review lanes.
Records public_registry access policy and raw_storage path for the retained ClinicalTrials.gov payload.
Creates the retained raw payload, normalized markdown, section index, parser metadata, and artifact hashes for registry-text reuse.
